_meta.keyKnowledge: We explore the diversity of design solutions across different fields and consider culturally, legally and ethically responsible approaches.

_source.w: We explore the diversity of design solutions across different fields and consider culturally, legally and ethically responsible approaches.
y: Understanding the ethical dimensions of design prepares us to be responsible practitioners.
Exploring diverse design fields shows us the breadth of career possibilities in visual communication.
Culturally responsive design ensures our work respects and includes diverse communities.
eg: We explore design solutions across fields — graphic, product, environmental, digital, fashion.
We discuss legal considerations like copyright, intellectual property and permissions.
We investigate ethical questions about representation and inclusion in design.
We explore culturally responsive design that respects First Nations and diverse cultural knowledge.
We analyse how design can both reinforce and challenge stereotypes.
We discuss the designer's responsibility to society, culture and the environment.
